purpose: Define the stable business object that all views, actions, status tokens, and detail surfaces operate on.

designQuestions: Which fields are primary labels, status, ownership, dates, and permissions?
Which actions are global, row-level, object-level, or bulk?

devExtremePrimitives.role: Create, edit, and review object fields.
Object details or focused edit flows.

validationRules: Do not start with dashboard widgets until the source object and freshness model are clear.
Expose object identity in every detail or action surface.
Keep status, owner, due date, and permissions close to row-level actions when they affect what users can do.

devExtremePrimitives.role: Hierarchical object table with row actions and columns.
Navigation or selection over a hierarchy.
Expandable row detail for related records.

validationRules: Use hierarchy widgets when hierarchy changes scanning, navigation, permissions, or rollup behavior.
Use master-detail when child data is secondary to a flat primary list.
